username.format: Username may only contain a-z, 0-9 and _ . -

password.min: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.

member.nameTooLong: Member name must not exceed 100 characters.

category.nameTooLong: Category name must not exceed 100 characters.

tag.nameTooLong: Tag name must not exceed 100 characters.

expense.nameTooLong: Expense name must not exceed 200 characters.

share.amountNegative: Amount must be a non-negative whole number.
share.duplicateMember: Each member can have only one share per expense.

event.nameTooLong: Event name must not exceed 200 characters.
event.rangeInvalid: The end date must be on or after the start date.
